name: macvoice
description: OpenClaw provider for macOS voice message support via voicecli

scripts.version:sync: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const pkg = require('./package.json'); const manifestPath = './openclaw.plugin.json'; const manifest = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(manifestPath, 'utf8')); manifest.version = pkg.version; fs.writeFileSync(manifestPath, JSON.stringify(manifest, null, 2) + '\n');"
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run version:sync && npm run changelog && git add CHANGELOG.md package.json openclaw.plugin.json && git commit -m "chore(release): update changelog and bump version" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm run version:sync && npm run changelog && git add CHANGELOG.md package.json openclaw.plugin.json && git commit -m "chore(release): update changelog and bump version" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
scripts.version:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && npm run version:sync && npm run changelog && git add CHANGELOG.md package.json openclaw.plugin.json && git commit -m "chore(release): update changelog and bump version" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
scripts.publish:clawhub: clawhub package publish "$(pwd)" --family code-plugin --source-repo acwilan/openclaw-macvoice --source-commit $(git rev-parse HEAD) --name macvoice --version $(node -p "require('./package.json').version")

author: Andres Rovira
